zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Payn於1574年9月2日出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪聖 尼古拉斯時，他的父親Richard Payn39歲，母親Mrs Joan Payne26歲。他於大約1599年與Elizabeth Paine在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他去世於1644年9月13日在他的家鄉享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Payn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Payn was born on 2 September 1574, in St Nicholas, Aberdeen, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Payn, was 39 and his mother, Mrs Joan Payne, was 26. He married Elizabeth Paine about 1599, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 13 September 1644, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Payn est né le 2 septembre 1574, à St Nicholas, Aberdeen, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Payn, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mrs Joan Payne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Paine environ 1599, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 13 septembre 1644, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Payn(이)가 1574년 9월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디 스트 닉홀아스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Payn(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Joan Payne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1599년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 Elizabeth Paine(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1644년 9월 13일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
